chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1017 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.1745/2023 (I Rule 10 CPC) 3. For hearing of main case 17.01.2024 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners / intervenor. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition as well as CMA No.1745/2023 filed under Order I Rule 10 CPC, which are accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
